translations.en: a young human child.
translations.zh: 一個年幼的人類孩童。

translations.en: "Hi again!"
translations.zh: 「又來了！」

translations.en: "Wow! Two-eyed people like me! You gotta go see my folks!"
translations.zh: 「哇！跟我一樣是兩隻眼睛的人！你一定要去見見我的家人！」

translations.en: "I'm Myles."
translations.zh: 「我是邁爾斯。」

translations.en: "But Mama and Papa aren't good with names."
translations.zh: 「但媽媽和爸爸不擅長記名字。」

translations.en: "They just call me 'tiny one!'"
translations.zh: 「他們只叫我『小不點』！」

translations.en: "They're not my real parents."
translations.zh: 「他們不是我的親生父母。」

translations.en: "Mama and Papa found me on the beach."
translations.zh: 「媽媽和爸爸在海灘上找到我的。」

translations.en: "I guess my real parents drowned or something."
translations.zh: 「我想我的親生父母是溺死了或是怎麼了。」

translations.en: "That was long ago. I don't remember much about it."
translations.zh: 「那是很久以前的事了。我不太記得。」

translations.en: "Mama and Papa said they used to have a son of their own, but he died."
translations.zh: 「媽媽和爸爸說他們以前有自己的兒子，但他死了。」

translations.en: "So they @adopted me!"
translations.zh: 「所以他們@adopted（收養）了我！」

translations.en: "We all live in that big old castle!"
translations.zh: 「我們都住在那座古老的大城堡裡！」

translations.en: "It's a real neat place, with all sorts of rooms and @cellars and stairs and @stuff."
translations.zh: 「那是個很棒的地方，有各種各樣的房間、@cellars（地）下室、樓梯和@stuff（雜物）。」

translations.en: "A lot of places are locked. Papa keeps the keys."
translations.zh: 「很多地方都鎖著。爸爸保管鑰匙。」

translations.en: "Oh, I help Mama and @Papa!"
translations.zh: 「哦，我幫媽媽和@Papa（爸爸）！」

translations.en: "Though sometimes I think Papa wishes I were big and strong like a cyclops, so I could help more."
translations.zh: 「雖然有時我覺得爸爸希望我像獨眼巨人一樣又大又壯，這樣我就能幫更多忙了。」

translations.en: "There's a whole lot of junk lying around the castle."
translations.zh: 「城堡裡到處都是雜七雜八的東西。」

translations.en: "Ask Mama or Papa about it."
translations.zh: 「去問媽媽或爸爸吧。」

translations.en: "Papa doesn't let me play with much of it."
translations.zh: 「爸爸不讓我碰大部分的東西。」

translations.en: "See you later!"
translations.zh: 「再見！」

translations.en: "Huh?"

translator_notes: 邁爾斯是被獨眼巨人夫婦收養的人類孩童，活潑直白的孩子口吻。獨眼巨人只叫他「小不點」。
